contraindications.clinicalRationale: GLP-1 RA should not be used in combination with a DPP-4 inhibitor as they have overlapping mechanisms of action and may lead to unnecessary duplication of therapy without additional benefit
contraindications.riskDescription: Unnecessary duplication of incretin-based therapy without additional efficacy
contraindications.alternativeConsiderations: Consider stopping DPP-4 inhibitor to facilitate GLP-1 RA treatment
contraindications.sourceSnippet: Practice Point 4.2.3: GLP-1 RA should not be used in combination with a DPP-4 inhibitor.
